claim: mTORC2 inhibits xCT antiporter through phosphorylation.

result.claim: mTORC2 inhibits xCT antiporter through phosphorylation.
result.reasoning: The claim is strongly supported by direct evidence from paper ID 23895668, titled "mTORC2 Regulates Amino Acid Metabolism in Cancer by Phosphorylation of the Cystine-Glutamate Antiporter xCT." The abstract of this paper explicitly states: "Using an unbiased proteomic screen, we identified mTORC2 as a critical regulator of amino acid metabolism in cancer via phosphorylation of the cystine-glutamate antiporter xCT. mTORC2 phosphorylates serine 26 at the cytosolic N terminus of xCT, inhibiting its activity." This directly confirms that mTORC2 inhibits the xCT antiporter through phosphorylation.

evidence.text: Nlrp12 inhibits Akt phosphorylation following TCR activation.
evidence.source: The Dual Immunoregulatory function of Nlrp12 in T Cell-Mediated Immune Response: Lessons from Experimental Autoimmune Encephalomyelitis

evidence.text: Antimycin A, an electron transport chain inhibitor, mimicked the effect of FCCP on CaWs.
evidence.source: Modulation of Intracellular Calcium Waves and Triggered Activities by Mitochondrial Ca Flux in Mouse Cardiomyocytes

evidence.text: Cyclosporine A, a mitochondrial permeability transition pore blocker, counteracted the effects of FCCP on CaWs.
evidence.source: Modulation of Intracellular Calcium Waves and Triggered Activities by Mitochondrial Ca Flux in Mouse Cardiomyocytes

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 inhibits the PI3K/mTOR axis.
evidence.source: NVP-BEZ235, a dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor, prevents PI3K signaling and inhibits the growth of cancer cells with activating PI3K mutations.

evidence.text: Nlrp12 inhibits NF-κB phosphorylation following TCR activation.
evidence.source: The Dual Immunoregulatory function of Nlrp12 in T Cell-Mediated Immune Response: Lessons from Experimental Autoimmune Encephalomyelitis

evidence.text: SkQT1 is a less effective inhibitor of ATP synthesis.
evidence.source: New Data on Effects of SkQ1 and SkQT1 on Rat Liver Mitochondria and Yeast Cells

evidence.text: YY1 is a known repressor of sarcomeric gene expression.
evidence.source: Yin-Yang 1, a New Player in Early Heart Development

evidence.text: The ATM phosphorylation targets on human PNKP are Ser 114 and Ser 126.
evidence.source: ATM-mediated phosphorylation of polynucleotide kinase/phosphatase is required for effective DNA double-strand break repair

evidence.text: Nlrp12 has no effect on S6 phosphorylation in the mTOR pathway.
evidence.source: The Dual Immunoregulatory function of Nlrp12 in T Cell-Mediated Immune Response: Lessons from Experimental Autoimmune Encephalomyelitis

evidence.text: The Cdk5-ATM signal regulates phosphorylation and function of the ATM targets p53 and H2AX.
evidence.source: Phosphorylation of ATM by Cdk5 mediates DNA damage signaling and regulates neuronal death

evidence.text: LSD1 and PARP1 inhibitors are prosurvival molecular tools.
evidence.source: PARP1‐LSD1 functional interplay controls transcription of SOD2 that protects human pro‐inflammatory macrophages from death under an oxidative condition

evidence.text: IFI16 interacts with STING to promote STING phosphorylation and translocation.
evidence.source: IFI16 and cGAS cooperate in the activation of STING during DNA sensing in human keratinocytes

evidence.text: 6PGD-mediated production of ribulose-5-phosphate (Ru-5-P) inhibits AMPK activation.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: Genetic inhibition of mTORC2 promotes glutamate secretion.
evidence.source: mTORC2 Regulates Amino Acid Metabolism in Cancer by Phosphorylation of the Cystine-Glutamate Antiporter xCT.

evidence.text: Physcion is a 6PGD inhibitor.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: The phosphorylation of Ser 114 and Ser 126 is essential for damage-induced enhancement of the activity of PNKP.
evidence.source: ATM-mediated phosphorylation of polynucleotide kinase/phosphatase is required for effective DNA double-strand break repair

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 inhibited the activation of Akt, S6 ribosomal protein, and 4EBP1 in breast cancer cells.
evidence.source: NVP-BEZ235, a dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor, prevents PI3K signaling and inhibits the growth of cancer cells with activating PI3K mutations.

evidence.text: SNOs decrease GRK2-mediated beta-AR phosphorylation.
evidence.source: Regulation of β-Adrenergic Receptor Signaling by S-Nitrosylation of G-Protein-Coupled Receptor Kinase 2

evidence.text: Kaempferol, a mitochondrial Ca(2+) uniporter activator, counteracted the effects of FCCP on CaWs.
evidence.source: Modulation of Intracellular Calcium Waves and Triggered Activities by Mitochondrial Ca Flux in Mouse Cardiomyocytes

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 was combined with a mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK) inhibitor ARRY-142886.
evidence.source: Effective Use of PI3K and MEK Inhibitors to Treat Mutant K-Ras G12D and PIK3CA H1047R Murine Lung Cancers
